an4.15:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these four proclamations of the foremost. What four?
an4.15:1.0.2: Rāhu is the foremost of those with bodies,Mandhātā, of those enjoying sense pleasures;Māra is the foremost of rulers,blazing with power and glory.
an4.15:1.0.3: In this world together with its devasabove, across, and below,as far as the world extends,the Buddha is declared foremost.
